failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: VVGKTc
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 400 Documented: 200
[400] Bad Request:
`{"type":"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc9110#section-15.5.1","title":"One or more validation errors occurred.","status":400,"errors":{"RequestContext.TenantId":["The TenantId field is required."],"RequestContext.UserType":["The UserType field is required."],"RequestContext.ActorUserId":["The ActorUserId field is required."],"RequestContext.AffiliateId":["The AffiliateId field is required."]},"traceId":"00-dc6d73934e829c04b16eccb92eedae48-e6a497d9ea701731-00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/*+json' -d '{"requestContext": {}, "x-schemathesis-unknown-property": 42}' http://167.172.49.177:8080/api/v1/Batches/e3e70682-c209-1cac-a29f-6fbed82c07cd/submit

1. Test Case ID: KVUIRQ
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[400] Bad Request:
`{"type":"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc9110#section-15.5.1","title":"One or more validation errors occurred.","status":400,"errors":{"RequestContext":["The RequestContext field is required."]},"traceId":"00-903eb8fefc81bfb801c914bdf9048a4e-f10dd5f1d25355e3-00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}' http://167.172.49.177:8080/api/v1/Batches/e3e70682-c209-1cac-a29f-6fbed82c07cd/submit

1. Test Case ID: PYlCIk
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 400 Documented: 200
[400] Bad Request:
`{"type":"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc9110#section-15.5.1","title":"One or more validation errors occurred.","status":400,"errors":{"ProductId":["The ProductId field is required."],"File.FileName":["The FileName field is required."],"File.FileBase64":["The FileBase64 field is required."],"File.ContentType":["The ContentType field is required."],"RequestContext.TenantId":["The TenantId field is required."],"RequestContext.UserType":["The UserType field is required."],"RequestContext.ActorUserId":["The Acto // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/*+json' -d '{"file": {}, "productId": null, "requestContext": {}, "x-schemathesis-unknown-property": 42}' http://167.172.49.177:8080/api/v1/Batches/card-creation/upload

1. Test Case ID: nAoYpD
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[400] Bad Request:
`{"type":"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc9110#section-15.5.1","title":"One or more validation errors occurred.","status":400,"errors":{"File":["The File field is required."],"ProductId":["The ProductId field is required."],"RequestContext":["The RequestContext field is required."]},"traceId":"00-3ce2b1023e88036a6c388da4eaf7cc4d-e0685b4cbfc946f8-00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}' http://167.172.49.177:8080/api/v1/Batches/card-creation/upload

1. Test Case ID: wVFeQg
- Custom check failed: `auth_enforced_on_protected_endpoints`
Auth not enforced: endpoint declares `security` requirements but returned 200 for an unauthenticated request.
[200] OK:
`{"batchId":"e3e70682-c209-1cac-a29f-6fbed82c07cd","status":"COMPLETED","totalRows":100,"validRows":95,"invalidRows":5,"processedRows":95,"failedRows":0,"createdAt":"2026-05-05T04:29:20.1585193Z","updatedAt":"2026-05-05T04:29:20.1585194Z"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET http://167.172.49.177:8080/api/v1/Batches/e3e70682-c209-1cac-a29f-6fbed82c07cd

1. Test Case ID: QdSk7t
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 400 Documented: 200
[400] Bad Request:
`{"type":"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc9110#section-15.5.1","title":"One or more validation errors occurred.","status":400,"errors":{"RequestContext.TenantId":["The TenantId field is required."],"RequestContext.UserType":["The UserType field is required."],"RequestContext.ActorUserId":["The ActorUserId field is required."],"RequestContext.AffiliateId":["The AffiliateId field is required."]},"traceId":"00-1ba1fe4fcc5749e761df4e8e934d02af-9ab1db8f27bd9e06-00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/*+json' -d '{"requestContext": {}, "x-schemathesis-unknown-property": 42}' http://167.172.49.177:8080/api/v1/Batches/e3e70682-c209-1cac-a29f-6fbed82c07cd/validate

1. Test Case ID: om8CPb
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[400] Bad Request:
`{"type":"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc9110#section-15.5.1","title":"One or more validation errors occurred.","status":400,"errors":{"RequestContext":["The RequestContext field is required."]},"traceId":"00-f8528977d3592bc4b071a4df48a44697-27e4520dd73891c1-00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}' http://167.172.49.177:8080/api/v1/Batches/e3e70682-c209-1cac-a29f-6fbed82c07cd/validate

1. Test Case ID: gfthwF
- Custom check failed: `auth_enforced_on_protected_endpoints`
Auth not enforced: endpoint declares `security` requirements but returned 200 for an unauthenticated request.
[200] OK:
`{"batchId":"e3e70682-c209-1cac-a29f-6fbed82c07cd","resultFile":"Batch_e3e70682-c209-1cac-a29f-6fbed82c07cd_Results.csv","downloadUrl":"https://example.com/downloads/Batch_e3e70682-c209-1cac-a29f-6fbed82c07cd_Results.csv"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET http://167.172.49.177:8080/api/v1/Batches/e3e70682-c209-1cac-a29f-6fbed82c07cd/results/download

1. Test Case ID: hyGVjC
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 400 Documented: 200
[400] Bad Request:
`{"type":"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc9110#section-15.5.1","title":"One or more validation errors occurred.","status":400,"errors":{"Page":["The field Page must be between 1 and 2147483647."],"PageSize":["The field PageSize must be between 1 and 100."]},"traceId":"00-623ccf0409206d7235e7355276adcd75-d690dbbec25a625c-00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET 'http://167.172.49.177:8080/api/v1/Batches/e3e70682-c209-1cac-a29f-6fbed82c07cd/rows?Page=0&PageSize=0'

1. Test Case ID: 8x3DuI
- Custom check failed: `auth_enforced_on_protected_endpoints`
Auth not enforced: endpoint declares `security` requirements but returned 200 for an unauthenticated request.
[200] OK:
`{"page":1,"pageSize":25,"total":95,"batchId":"e3e70682-c209-1cac-a29f-6fbed82c07cd","data":[{"rowNumber":1,"status":"INVALID","errors":[{"errorCode":"SAMPLE_ERROR_CODE","message":"Sample error message"}],"linkedEntityRefs":{"customerId":"CUS-102-4309","cardId":"CAR-203-9485"}},{"rowNumber":2,"status":"INVALID","errors":[{"errorCode":"SAMPLE_ERROR_CODE","message":"Sample error message"}],"linkedEntityRefs":{"customerId":"CUS-102-4309","cardId":"CAR-203-9485"}},{"rowNumber":3,"status":"INVALID","errors":[{"er // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET http://167.172.49.177:8080/api/v1/Batches/e3e70682-c209-1cac-a29f-6fbed82c07cd/rows
